settings.heading: A cleaner alternative to rawhide.
settings.subheading: Prime Pet Food Himalayan yak cheese chews are simple-ingredient, long-lasting, and made for supervised dog enrichment.
settings.problem_text: Many dog parents want a chew that feels cleaner, simpler, and easier to trust than conventional rawhide.
settings.solution_heading: Yak cheese chews keep the ingredient list simple.
settings.solution_text: Our chews are made with yak milk, cow milk, lime juice, and salt, then dried into a dense chew dogs can work on slowly.
settings.review_1: This replaced rawhide in our house. My dog loves it.
settings.review_2: Simple ingredients and it lasts. That is exactly what I wanted.
settings.review_3: A cleaner chew routine without the rawhide stress.
settings.product_heading: Switch to Prime Pet Food yak chews.
settings.product_text: A premium rawhide-free chew designed for long-lasting supervised enrichment.
settings.final_heading: Upgrade from rawhide to a cleaner chew routine.
settings.final_text: Simple ingredients. Longer chew time. More confidence.
